name: Dig for TCG Cards With Your Friends
short_description: A cozy junkyard card-collecting sim - now with online co-op. Dig through mountains of trash with friends, hunt rare collectible cards, sell your junk for profit, and upgrade your gear.
reasons: 次点ジャンル: Online Co-op +30
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Unwoven
short_description: Face off against cursed creatures and protect Laima’s legacy in Unwoven®, a fast-paced twin-stick shooter. Explore a gothic mansion and vanquish the spawn of a family curse. But beware: fate will test your skills and make every path more challenging.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Stick Scholars
short_description: A social deduction party game where players parkour to school, answer trivia, and hunt down a hidden Class Clown who is sabotaging to try and make the entire group fail!

name: Life & Shadow: Celestial Call - Prologue
short_description: You are trapped in the observatory of a star-obsessed professor atop Mount Clearveil. Plan your survival during the day, confront the darkness of the basement at night. Can you break the ritual and uncover the mystery?

name: Game Compressor
short_description: Free up space without deleting games! Game Compressor uses Windows LZX to reduce game sizes by up to 50%. Preview estimated savings, choose the most efficient games, play without extracting archives, and undo compression anytime.

name: Quarantine Market Simulator
short_description: Run a market inside a quarantine zone. Check temperatures, manage customers and inventory, and defend the walls during zombie raids. A first-person market management simulator set in a post-apocalyptic world.

name: Mothkeep
short_description: Mothkeep is a short singleplayer moth documenting game where you step into a peaceful nature sanctuary and discover its native moths, one journal entry at a time. ✒️🦋

name: Harvester vs. Zombies
short_description: Mill hordes of zombies on the roads of villages, towns, and cities, avoid obstacles, buy upgrades, unlock increasingly powerful vehicles, complete missions, collect cards, earn achievements, break records, and compete with players from around the world in leaderboards and statistics.

name: Quantum Void
short_description: Lost in an unexplored star system after a dimensional anomaly dispersed your fleet, you start to pick up signals scattered throughout the system. Explore the wrecks of the corporate fleet, discover the secrets of the anomaly, and try to get the good ending.

name: Arcane Ascent
short_description: Build powerful decks to face the chaos unleashed by the Primeval Witch. With hundreds of combinations available, perfect your strategy in every battle, strengthen your cards and unravel the mysteries that await you - your rise to power begins now!

name: Harem Fantasy - Femboy Futa Tales DLC
short_description: Femboy Futa Tales is the first minor expansion to Harem Fantasy. Immerse yourself in a world of forbidden fantasies and sensual temptations in the pages of the beautiful Yi-Ling's novels. Here, everything will be revealed, without restraint or boundaries.

name: 101 Cats in Brussels
short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 kittens 🐾 in the hand-crafted Brussels landscape. 🏆 Earn lots of achievements. How many 😺 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

name: Fantasy World / 幻想世界
short_description: This is a large-map construction simulation combined with a roguelike game. You will build a civilization, explore the wilderness, discover mysterious underground secrets, command large armies to fight against hordes of enemies, gather various materials and equipment, and build your own kingdom.

name: Ascent Of Eternity

name: INSANIO
short_description: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

name: Sex Shop Simulator: Sinful Girls
short_description: Sex Shop Simulator: Sinful Girls is a deep management and adult life sim that will turn you from a simple shop owner into the city's most popular icon! Stay in tune with the streets, dance in elite clubs and personally fulfil your clients' fantasies.

name: SCP
short_description: Explore, craft, and survive in a post-apocalyptic world where SCP anomalies roam freely. Brace yourself for nightly assaults as SCP-049's twisted creations close in.

name: Tired
short_description: High-speed cyberpunk time trial racing. Master 18 tracks with tight controls, instant restarts, and no distractions—just you, the clock, and the push to go faster. Your biggest rival is your own skill.

name: SmarterWaysProductions: Andromeda
short_description: The future is local – bring it to your PC with SmarterWaysProductions: Andromeda. Experience private AI for chat and analysis via voice today as we build toward your fully capable, helpful assistant. Your data belongs to you 100%. Scalable from laptop to high-end systems.

name: SILK 2.0
short_description: Step into the forgotten Silk Roads of medieval Anatolia and uncover living stories through immersive exploration, atmospheric spaces, and AI-driven characters in a university-led research project reimagining ancient caravanserais.

name: Cool Game Pack
short_description: Cool Game Pack is a collection of high-quality mini games with retro vibes and offers an unique blend of logic, physics, and reflex-based. Unwind and engage your mind with fun, just like in the good old days!

name: Cozy Finds
short_description: Settle in and unwind with a cozy 3D spot-the-difference game. Rotate, zoom, and explore the charming miniature office as you search for every small change. No stress — just careful observation, good music, and satisfying discoveries.

name: Rat Race
short_description: Here you come to be the toughest rat in the sewers, where every delivery can end on the correct delivery point... or you can be crushed into the pipes. Do you dare to be the fastest rat in town?

name: Shipyard of Theseus
short_description: A game about thinking about ships.

name: Rahasya
short_description: Enter a cursed ancestral haveli and uncover the truth behind a forgotten bloodline while surviving a reactive entity that watches, listens, learns your habits, and adapts to how you survive. Explore hidden rooms, solve ritual-based puzzles, and survive

name: Imagine We Were Human
short_description: A compilation of 12 small literary games about humans meeting and missing one another. Explore these experimental experiences that were made on a monthly basis over the course of a year.

name: GaebongAllStar
short_description: An online brawler where up to 10 players fight together! Choose a unique character, make use of items and terrain, and become the last one standing.

name: Warehouse 30
short_description: Take on your father's job as a warehouse clerk, inspect each shipment note carefully and direct them to where the corresponding warehouse. Stick to the rules, avoid making mistakes and subsequently fines to make enough money to help your family get through this rough patch.

name: Sandfall: Rock Smash
short_description: Smash rocks with hammer. Sand falls in cart. Make money. Repeat.

name: Veilscripture AI
short_description: Veilscripture — Roleplay with characters that are yours. On your machine. No one watching.
